description: LLM Tool Calling Integration - Enable natural language queries to invoke bot commands with context tracking and user mentions

userStories.title: Extend database schema for command context tracking
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to extend the llm_conversation_context table to support tracking all command interactions, not just !ask queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Add command_name column to llm_conversation_context table (nullable TEXT)
Add sender_name column to llm_conversation_context table for user mentions (nullable TEXT)
Create and run migration _m0014_extend_llm_context_for_commands
Migration registered in MIGRATIONS list in db_migrations.py
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed - migration added, tests pass, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add user mention support to LLMCommand
userStories.description: As a mesh network user, I want to be mentioned when the bot responds to my message so I can easily identify responses directed at me.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract sender name from MeshMessage in LLMCommand.execute()
Add include_user_mention config option (default: true) to [LLM_Command] section
Prefix all LLM responses with '[@username] ' when include_user_mention is true
Skip mention prefix for DMs (is_dm=true)
Update config.ini.example with include_user_mention setting
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed - user mentions added, 5 new tests pass, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extend LLMContextManager to support command context
userStories.description: As a developer, I need LLMContextManager to store and retrieve context from all command executions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add add_command_context() method to LLMContextManager with parameters: context_key, command_name, user_input, bot_response, sender_name
Update get_context() to include command context entries in chronological order
Update format_context_for_ollama() to handle command context entries with role='system' or 'user' appropriately
Add track_all_commands config option (default: true) to [LLM_Command] section
Update config.ini.example with track_all_commands setting
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for add_command_context() and retrieval
userStories.notes: Completed - command context support added, 7 new tests pass, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Hook MessageHandler to capture all command context
userStories.description: As a developer, I need MessageHandler to automatically capture and store context for all command executions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add context capture hook in MessageHandler after successful command execution
Extract context_key using same logic as LLMCommand (channel name or sender pubkey)
Call LLMContextManager.add_command_context() with command name, user input, and bot response
Only capture context if track_all_commands config is enabled
Skip capturing context for !ask and !clear-context commands (already handled by LLMCommand)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for context capture flow
userStories.notes: Completed - hook added in CommandManager, 11 tests pass, all tests pass (2981 total)

userStories.title: Add OllamaClient.chat() method for tool calling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need OllamaClient to support the /api/chat endpoint with tool definitions for function calling.
acceptanceCriteria: Add chat() async method to OllamaClient class
Accept parameters: messages (list), tools (list), stream (bool, default False)
Call /api/chat endpoint instead of /api/generate
Parse response for tool_calls array in message
Return full response including tool_calls if present
Handle errors and timeouts consistently with generate() method
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for chat() method with mock responses
userStories.notes: Completed - chat() method added with 10 comprehensive tests, all tests pass (3005 total), typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create ToolRegistry for command discovery and schema generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a ToolRegistry to discover available commands and generate OpenAI-compatible tool schemas.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new module modules/tool_registry.py with ToolRegistry class
Implement get_available_commands() to discover whitelisted commands from CommandManager
Implement generate_tool_schema() for a single command to OpenAI function format
Implement get_all_tool_schemas() to return list of all tool schemas
Read available_tools config from [LLM_Command] section (comma-separated list)
Only include commands in whitelist (wx,airplanes,satpass,path,stats,moon,sun,aurora)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for schema generation
userStories.notes: Completed - ToolRegistry created with 16 comprehensive tests, all tests pass (3021 total), typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create ToolExecutor for executing tool calls
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a ToolExecutor to parse tool calls from LLM and execute commands safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new module modules/tool_executor.py with ToolExecutor class
Implement execute_tool() method accepting tool_name and arguments dict
Create synthetic MeshMessage from arguments for command execution
Execute command via CommandManager with 10-second timeout
Capture command output and return as string
Handle errors gracefully and return error message to LLM
Validate tool_name against whitelist before execution
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for tool execution flow
userStories.notes: Completed - ToolExecutor created with 20 comprehensive tests, all tests pass (3041 total), typecheck passes

userStories.title: Integrate tool calling into LLMCommand.execute()
userStories.description: As a developer, I need LLMCommand to detect tool calls from LLM and execute them in a loop until final response.
acceptanceCriteria: Add enable_tools config option (default: false) to [LLM_Command] section
Load ToolRegistry and ToolExecutor in LLMCommand.__init__()
Modify execute() to use chat() instead of generate() when enable_tools is true
Implement tool-calling loop: call LLM → check for tool_calls → execute tools → add results to messages → repeat
Add max_tools_per_query config option (default: 3) to prevent abuse
Add tool_timeout config option (default: 10) for execution timeout
Update config.ini.example with tool settings
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for tool-calling flow
userStories.notes: Completed - tool calling integration with 10 tests, all tests pass (3037 total), typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add tool schema for wx_command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ToolRegistry to generate accurate schema for weather command.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolRegistry generates schema for wx_command with location parameter (required)
Include forecast_type parameter (optional, enum: current/tomorrow/7d/hourly)
Schema description: 'Get weather conditions and forecast for a location'
ToolExecutor can execute wx_command with extracted location
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for wx_command tool execution
userStories.notes: Completed - parameter metadata added, 8 new tests pass (4 schema + 4 execution), typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add tool schema for airplanes_command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ToolRegistry to generate accurate schema for aircraft tracking command.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolRegistry generates schema for airplanes_command with optional radius parameter
Schema description: 'Get information about nearby aircraft using ADS-B data'
ToolExecutor can execute airplanes_command with optional radius
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for airplanes_command tool execution

userStories.title: Add tool schema for satpass_command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ToolRegistry to generate accurate schema for satellite pass command.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolRegistry generates schema for satpass_command with optional satellite parameter
Schema description: 'Get satellite pass information for ISS and other satellites'
ToolExecutor can execute satpass_command with satellite name
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for satpass_command tool execution

userStories.title: Add tool schema for path_command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ToolRegistry to generate accurate schema for network path analysis command.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolRegistry generates schema for path_command with destination parameter (required)
Schema description: 'Analyze mesh network path to a destination node, showing repeaters and signal quality'
ToolExecutor can execute path_command with destination node
Typecheck passes
Tests pass for path_command tool execution

userStories.title: Add integration test for end-to-end tool calling flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need integration tests to verify the complete tool calling workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test_llm_tool_calling.py in tests/ directory
Test: User asks weather question → LLM calls wx_command → response includes weather data
Test: User asks airplane question → LLM calls airplanes_command → response includes aircraft
Test: Multi-tool query calls both wx and satpass tools
Test: Invalid tool call is rejected gracefully
Test: Tool timeout is handled with error message
Test: User mention prefix is added to responses
Test: Command context is stored for non-!ask commands
All integration tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add configuration documentation for tool calling
userStories.description: As a bot administrator, I need clear documentation on how to configure and use tool calling features.
acceptanceCriteria: Update config.ini.example with all tool calling settings and comments
Add [LLM_Tools] section with tool-specific defaults
Document enable_tools, max_tools_per_query, tool_timeout, available_tools
Document include_user_mention and track_all_commands settings
Add example queries to help users understand natural language capabilities
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Deploy and test tool calling on remote bot instance
userStories.description: As a bot administrator, I want to deploy the tool calling feature to the production bot and verify it works.
acceptanceCriteria: Deploy updated code to brian@10.100.10.49:/opt/meshcore-bot
Run database migration to add command context columns
Update config.ini with enable_tools=true and tool settings
Restart bot service and verify it loads without errors
Test natural language weather query on #beeboopbot channel
Test natural language airplane query on #beeboopbot channel
Verify user mention appears in responses
Verify command context is stored for !wx and other commands
All manual tests pass on production instance
